summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FREEsites website redesign. Light theme successfully implemented with all core functionality working. Found one design issue with colorful card backgrounds being overridden by CSS.

design_issues.component: How It Works cards and Benefits Bento Grid
design_issues.issue: Colorful backgrounds (green, teal, amber, violet, rose) not displaying - overridden by .feature-card CSS rule
design_issues.details: Tailwind classes are applied but .feature-card { background: #ffffff; } in App.css overrides them

ui_bugs.issue: Element instability during hover testing due to animations
ui_bugs.details: Functional but animations cause test instability

passed_tests: Navigation with FREEsites logo, links (So geht's, Über mich, Vorteile), and green 'Jetzt Starten' CTA button
Hero section with correct heading 'Deine neue Website. Kostenlos entwickelt.', RISIKOFREI badge, and buttons
Location tag 'Webdesign aus Müllheim bei Freiburg' displayed correctly
How It Works section with 3 cards (structure and content correct)
About section with Mira's circular photo (border-radius: 9999px) and correct heading
Benefits Bento Grid with 5 cards (structure correct)
Contact section with Mira Knaup contact info and WhatsApp CTA card
Footer with Impressum and Datenschutz modal buttons that open correctly
All 4 WhatsApp links point to correct URL: https://wa.me/message/K772YPNGJLLON1
Mobile responsive design with working hamburger menu
Scroll animations working (19 animated elements detected)
Typography using correct fonts (Outfit for headings, Manrope for body)
Navigation glassmorphism effect with backdrop-filter: blur(20px)
Hero section gradient background applied correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix colorful card backgrounds: Remove or modify .feature-card { background: #ffffff; } in App.css to allow Tailwind bg-* classes to show through. Cards should display green, teal, amber, violet, and rose backgrounds as designed.
